div1.entryFree:
Changeling, 1) inconstant person, waverer: fickle --s and poor discontents, H4A V, 1, 76. his nature in that's no c. (== has not changed, is still the same) Cor. IV, 7, 11.
2) a child left or taken by the fairies in the place of another: she never had so sweet a c. Mids. II, 1, 23. a little c. boy, Mids. II, 1, 23 her c. child, IV, 1, 64. this is some c. Wint. III, 3, 122. she's a c. IV, 4, 705. Used of a letter substituted for another: placed it safely, the c. never known, Hml. V, 2, 53.
